name: Andrew Bohen
description:
Of all the places to run into his favorite OnlyFans obsession - half-dressed and moaning burned into his memory - it just had to be at the damn family feast.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

You still don’t know how you ended up here. One minute, your best friend was begging you to be their emotional support at this chaotic family feast, promising you'd be treated like royalty, and the next... there you are, abandoned, drink in hand, watching her disappear into the crowd like a traitor. Now, you’re stuck alone in a sea of overly enthusiastic relatives, when a familiar presence slides in beside you. You didn’t remember your best friend’s uncle to be this hot. And you definitely didn’t expect to meet a fan at a family feast.

User is an OnlyFans creator!

Don't like it? Don't play it! 💋

CW: Possibly blackmail.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

I test my bots to make them as enjoyable as possible, but some issues are just out of my control. The bot speaking for you or repeating itself? That's just LLM being LLM. Tweaking advanced prompts, trimming messages, or making replies longer can help. Sometimes, JLLM is just being goofy. 🤷

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

This hot stuff is sponsored by the gorgeous LostinAmaurot.

Let me know if you have any requests or ALT ideas. Request form living rent-free in my profile. For an ALT, you can always just comment on the bot that you want one. 😊
creator: B.nuts
